purpose: Generates pressurized steam for milk system operations by heating water supply

states.name: limescale_buildup
states.description: Limescale accumulation affecting heat transfer and pressure

states.name: pressure_stability
states.description: Steam pressure stability degrading with limescale buildup

events.name: steam_boiler_heating
events.description: Steam boiler is heating due to reduced efficiency

events.name: steam_boiler_emptied
events.description: Steam boiler emptied - machine shutdown required

events.name: steam_pressure_too_low
events.description: Steam pressure insufficient for milk products

parameters.name: limescale_accumulation_rate
parameters.description: Rate of limescale buildup per unit time

parameters.name: pressure_stability_timescale
parameters.description: Time constant for pressure stability degradation

parameters.name: water_supply_factor
parameters.description: Factor relating water supply pressure to steam output

parameters.name: temperature_efficiency_factor
parameters.description: Factor for temperature effect on steam generation

parameters.name: heating_threshold
parameters.description: Pressure stability threshold for heating warning

parameters.name: emptied_threshold
parameters.description: Pressure stability threshold for emptied failure

parameters.name: empty_threshold
parameters.description: Pressure stability threshold for empty failure

parameters.name: fill_threshold
parameters.description: Limescale buildup threshold for fill maintenance

parameters.name: low_pressure_threshold
parameters.description: Pressure stability threshold for low pressure warning

state_transition_logic: limescale_buildup increases by limescale_accumulation_rate * dt, clamped to [0, max_limescale_capacity]
pressure_stability decreases by (pressure_stability / pressure_stability_timescale) * (limescale_buildup / 100) * dt, clamped to [0, 100]
assumptions: Limescale buildup is the primary degradation mechanism affecting boiler performance
Pressure stability degrades proportionally to limescale accumulation
Steam output is proportional to water supply pressure and temperature
Hot water duration affects limescale accumulation rate indirectly through usage patterns
All thresholds are set to ensure healthy operation under normal conditions
